recommendations.title: Lost Soul: The Doomed Journey of Richard Stanley's Island of Dr. Moreau
recommendations.overview: The story of the insane scandals related to the remake of “Island of Dr. Moreau” —originally a novel by H. G. Wells—, which was brought to the big screen in 1996. How director Richard Stanley spent four years developing the project just to find an ab

recommendations.title: Boris: The Film
recommendations.overview: A director and his crew attempt to make the transition from the small to the big screen.
recommendations.director: Luca Vendruscolo, Giacomo Ciarrapico, Mattia Torre

recommendations.title: F for Fake
recommendations.overview: Documents the lives of infamous fakers Elmyr de Hory and Clifford Irving. De Hory, who later committed suicide to avoid more prison time, made his name by selling forged works of art by painters like Picasso and Matisse. Irving was infamous for writi

recommendations.title: Spielberg
recommendations.overview: A documentary on the life and career of one of the most influential film directors of all time, Steven Spielberg.

recommendations.title: X-Rated: The Greatest Adult Movies of All Time
recommendations.overview: The evolution of adult cinema through the most influential films in history, a journey that begins in the 1970s and ends nowadays. An in-depth analysis of the success of the most prestigious erotic films, their impact on industry and society, and the

recommendations.title: Lost in La Mancha
recommendations.overview: Fulton and Pepe's 2000 documentary captures Terry Gilliam's attempt to get The Man Who Killed Don Quixote off the ground. Back injuries, freakish storms, and more zoom in to sabotage the project.

recommendations.title: Catch Me If You Can
recommendations.overview: A true story about Frank Abagnale Jr. who, before his 19th birthday, successfully conned millions of dollars worth of checks as a Pan Am pilot, doctor, and legal prosecutor. An FBI agent makes it his mission to put him behind bars. But Frank not only

recommendations.title: Titan: The OceanGate Submersible Disaster
recommendations.overview: OceanGate's Titan tourist submersible imploded in 2023 on a deep-sea dive to the Titanic. This documentary details how a bold vision ended in tragedy.

recommendations.title: The Lady from Shanghai
recommendations.overview: A romantic drifter gets caught between a corrupt tycoon and his voluptuous wife.

recommendations.title: The Trial
recommendations.overview: Arrested for an unnamed crime, Josef K. is trapped in a surreal bureaucratic maze where justice is unknowable and guilt is assumed.
